description_long: This is a hand axe with a robust wooden handle, featuring a dark brown finish and metallic rivets along its length. The handle is wrapped with a textured grip near the base, likely for improved handling and comfort. Attached to the handle is a large, single-edged steel blade with a slightly curved cutting edge and a flat poll on the opposite side. Decorative feathers are affixed to the lower part of the handle, adding a distinctive ornamental touch. The blade is mounted securely with visible metal fastenings, and the overall design suggests both functionality and aesthetic appeal. The axe appears well-crafted, suitable for display or practical use in an urban or garage setting.
description: A hand axe with a wooden handle, steel blade, and decorative feathers, featuring a textured grip and metal rivets for durability and style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle with decorative feathers and the grip detail, blade edge not visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full steel blade profile, metal fastenings, and one feather hanging from the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the handle, grip wrapping, and the poll of the blade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the blade, metal fastenings, and two feathers attached to the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical wooden handle with a dark brown finish, wrapped with a textured grip near the base, round cross-section, and decorative feathers attached.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged steel blade with a slightly curved cutting edge, flat poll, and broad axe head; no visible beard, with a utilitarian and slightly rustic design.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional mounting with visible metal fastenings and rivets securing the blade to the wooden handle.
